title: ALCOHOL LICENSES AND SERVICE PERMITS - 211info
text: OREGON LIQUOR CONTROL COMMISSION ALCOHOL LICENSES AND SERVICE PERMITS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Issues liquor licenses and permits to businesses, restaurants, bars, taverns, and staff who are responsible for mixing, serving, and/or selling alcohol. Administers the Alcohol Server Education Program, which focuses on responsible alcohol service. Offers a confidential, anonymous complaint phone line. Through liquor law enforcement, outreach education, publicity, and communication, the OLCC also works to control underage drinking and alcohol problems within the community. 9079 SE McLoughlin Boulevard Milwaukie, OR 972227355 Eligibility: Businesses and employees involved in the sale of alcoholic beverages Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 872-5000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 872-5000 Toll-free (800) 452-6522 Intake (503) 872-5020 Retail Services Helpline (503) 872-5218 Anonymous Complaint Line Intake (503) 872-5200 Service Permits & Server Education Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by license or permit type DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 34 stops 1 block away Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Alcoholic Beverages Complaints Beer/Liquor Licenses and Permits Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - OREGON BOTTLE BILL CONSUMER REGULATION - CANNABIS AND ALCOHOL MANAGEMENT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LIQUOR CONTROL COMMISSION
